requirement_topic.en: Importer RUC Registration (SRI) and Spanish Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 进口商RUC登记（SRI）及西班牙语标注
requirement_topic.zht: 進口商RUC登記（SRI）及西班牙語標注

summary.en: All commercial importers operating in Ecuador must hold an active RUC (Registro Único de Contribuyentes) issued by the SRI (Servicio de Rentas Internas — Ecuador's tax authority). The RUC is the Ecuadorian tax identification number required for customs declarations, commercial invoices, and regulatory filings including the ARCOTEL homologación application. In addition, product labels must be in Spanish and include the ARCOTEL homologation approval number, the name and RUC of the Ecuadorian importer or authorised representative, country of origin, and key technical data.
summary.zh: 所有在厄瓜多尔开展商业进口的主体须持有由SRI（厄瓜多尔国家税务局）颁发的有效RUC（纳税人唯一登记号）。RUC是厄瓜多尔税务识别号，为海关申报、商业发票及监管备案（含ARCOTEL型式认证申请）所必须。此外，产品标签须使用西班牙语，并包含ARCOTEL型式认证批准编号、厄瓜多尔进口商或授权代表的名称及RUC、原产国及主要技术数据。
summary.zht: 所有在厄瓜多爾開展商業進口的主體須持有由SRI（厄瓜多爾國家稅務局）頒發的有效RUC（納稅人唯一登記號）。RUC是厄瓜多爾稅務識別號，為海關申報、商業發票及監管備案（含ARCOTEL型式認證申請）所必須。此外，產品標籤須使用西班牙語，並包含ARCOTEL型式認證批准編號、厄瓜多爾進口商或授權代表的名稱及RUC、原產國及主要技術數據。

standards_or_laws: Ley de Régimen Tributario Interno (RUC registration — SRI)
Reglamento de Etiquetado de Productos — Spanish labelling requirements
ARCOTEL homologación — importer/representative identification on label and dossier

summary.en: Chinese exporters hold MIIT and SRRC approvals in China. No direct equivalent of Ecuador's RUC importer registration exists in the CN export process; the obligation falls on the Ecuadorian importer or a locally registered representative. Chinese-language labels are standard for the domestic CN market; Spanish labelling and Ecuadorian importer identification must be added for the Ecuador market.
summary.zh: 中国出口商在中国持有MIIT和SRRC核准。厄瓜多尔RUC进口商登记在中国出口流程中没有直接对应环节；该义务由厄瓜多尔进口商或当地注册代表承担。中文标签是中国国内市场的惯例；面向厄瓜多尔市场须添加西班牙语标注和厄瓜多尔进口商识别信息。
summary.zht: 中國出口商在中國持有MIIT和SRRC核准。厄瓜多爾RUC進口商登記在中國出口流程中沒有直接對應環節；該義務由厄瓜多爾進口商或當地注冊代表承擔。中文標籤是中國國內市場的慣例；面向厄瓜多爾市場須添加西班牙語標注和厄瓜多爾進口商識別資訊。

standards_or_laws: MIIT / SRRC registration (China export side — not recognised in Ecuador)
CCC labelling (Chinese GB marks — not valid in Ecuador)

gap.en: Full gap: An Ecuadorian importer or authorised local representative with an active RUC is required before ARCOTEL homologación can be filed and products can clear customs. Chinese manufacturers or exporters without an Ecuadorian entity must appoint a local importer or agent. Spanish-language labelling incorporating the ARCOTEL approval number and the importer's RUC must be applied before products enter Ecuador.
gap.zh: 完全差距：在提交ARCOTEL型式认证申请及产品通关之前，须有持有有效RUC的厄瓜多尔进口商或授权当地代表。无厄瓜多尔实体的中国制造商或出口商须指定当地进口商或代理商。含ARCOTEL批准编号和进口商RUC的西班牙语标签须在产品进入厄瓜多尔前粘贴到位。
gap.zht: 完全差距：在提交ARCOTEL型式認證申請及產品通關之前，須有持有有效RUC的厄瓜多爾進口商或授權當地代表。無厄瓜多爾實體的中國製造商或出口商須指定當地進口商或代理商。含ARCOTEL批准編號和進口商RUC的西班牙語標籤須在產品進入厄瓜多爾前貼附到位。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An Ecuadorian RUC-registered importer or authorised representative is mandatory before ARCOTEL homologación can be filed and products can enter Ecuador commercially. Spanish-language labels showing the ARCOTEL approval number and importer RUC are required on the product. Verify current SRI RUC registration procedures and ARCOTEL labelling specifications with a qualified Ecuadorian regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在提交ARCOTEL型式认证申请及产品商业进入厄瓜多尔之前，须强制指定持有厄瓜多尔RUC的进口商或授权代表。产品上须有显示ARCOTEL批准编号和进口商RUC的西班牙语标签。请与合格的厄瓜多尔监管专业人士核验现行SRI RUC登记程序和ARCOTEL标注规范。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在提交ARCOTEL型式認證申請及產品商業進入厄瓜多爾之前，須強制指定持有厄瓜多爾RUC的進口商或授權代表。產品上須有顯示ARCOTEL批准編號和進口商RUC的西班牙語標籤。請與合格的厄瓜多爾監管專業人士核驗現行SRI RUC登記程序和ARCOTEL標注規範。
